name: SCC_CertificateUpdateReq
title: SCC_CertificateUpdateReq
syntax: void SCC_CertificateUpdateReq ( byte SessionID[], char ContractID[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Certificate Installation Request is received.
The list of root certificate IDs can be queried with

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
